task_summary: Coffee maker has been in transit with no update for more than seven days. Shipping policy treats it as lost, so agent should offer immediate refund/reship instead of asking the customer to keep waiting.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must treat the stale tracking as a lost-package claim.
Agent must issue the $149 refund after the customer chooses refund.
Agent must not require the customer to keep waiting without offering immediate refund or reship.

opening_message: ORD-7227 has had no tracking update for over a week. Please don't tell me to wait again.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7227. Coffee maker has been in transit with no update for more than seven days. Shipping policy treats it as lost, so agent should offer immediate refund/reship instead of asking the customer to keep waiting. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Say tracking has been stale for over a week.
Choose refund if offered refund or reship.
